lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior and interior show significant wear and damage. Mechanical components require major repairs and are not fully functional.
Poor condition.

Experience perfection on wheels! This stunning vehicle is in absolute mint condition, looking and driving as if it just left the factory. It has been impeccably maintained, with a flawless exterior and an interior that still feels brand new. A rare find for any discerning driver!

This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant rust and major body damage. The interior shows heavy wear, including tears in the upholstery and stained carpeting. Several mechanical systems are currently non-functional and require major repairs.

This vehicle is in impeccable, mint condition, essentially indistinguishable from a brand-new car. The exterior paint is flawless, with a deep, showroom-quality shine and absolutely no rock chips, scratches, or swirl marks. Inside, the cabin remains in factory condition; the leather is supple without any creases, and all surfaces are pristine. Mechanically, it is perfect, having been meticulously maintained with a complete service history. Every feature and electronic component functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. This is a rare opportunity to own a preserved example that looks and drives like it has never left the dealership floor.
This vehicle is in fair condition and shows typical signs of wear and tear for its age. The exterior has some cosmetic imperfections, including several scratches,

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a sophisticated balance of performance and enduring value. Featuring a clean profile and a well-preserved interior, it offers a refined driving experience that meets the high standards of the discerning motorist. Its mechanical integrity and consistent service history ensure reliable operation, making it a premier selection for those who prioritize quality and professional upkeep in their next automotive investment.

Hey there! I'm selling my trusty ride and it's looking for a brand new home! It’s been such a reliable companion for me—runs great and has been super well-maintained. It’s got that perfect balance of being broken in just right while still feeling fresh and ready for many more adventures. You’re going to love how it handles on the road! Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

Available is a driver-focused E46 M3 featuring the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six with individual throttle bodies. This example maintains its high-revving mechanical integrity, delivering linear power through a crisp 6-speed manual transmission. The chassis remains taut with a limited-slip differential providing excellent lateral grip. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and subframe inspection to ensure structural rigidity. While showing minor cosmetic patina consistent with its age, the powertrain remains robust and the suspension geometry is dialed for spirited cornering. A mechanically sound platform ready for the enthusiast who values performance over concours perfection.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Clean title. Maintenance records included. Reliable daily driver.

This vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and reliability. The exterior features a deep, glossy finish with only the slightest signs of careful use, while the alloy wheels remain crisp and clean. Inside, you'll find a smoke-free cabin with plush, well-preserved seating and an intuitive infotainment system that works flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine runs quietly and the transmission shifts smoothly, backed by a consistent maintenance record and a recent professional inspection. Whether you're commuting or heading out for a weekend trip, this car offers a comfortable, confident ride. It has been thoroughly detailed and is ready for immediate enjoyment.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a sophisticated blend of performance and reliability. Representing excellent value within its class, the automobile exhibits consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic. Discerning buyers will appreciate the refined driving dynamics and the assurance of a vehicle that has been held to professional standards of care.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This selection has undergone a rigorous inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and safety. Offering a refined driving experience and a well-preserved interior, this automobile represents an exceptional acquisition for the discerning buyer seeking dependable quality and lasting value.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that still looks great on the road? I'm parting with my well-loved car, and it's been such a joy to drive! It’s in solid shape, runs smoothly, and has been taken care of nicely over the years. Perfect for your daily commute or weekend adventures. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself—you're going to love it!

Presenting a driver-focused E46 M3 featuring the high-revving S54 B32 powerplant. This unit boasts a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox paired with a factory-spec variable M differential lock. Mechanical integrity is prioritized with a recently overhauled VANOS system and documented rear subframe reinforcement, effectively addressing common chassis fatigue points. The suspension retains its sharp turn-in response thanks to refreshed bushings and Bilstein dampers. Up for sale is a meticulously maintained vehicle that strikes the perfect balance between luxury and daily utility. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, with only the minor road chips one would expect from careful regular use. Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-taken care of over the years! It’s perfect for someone who wants a reliable daily driver that still looks great pulling into the driveway. I’ve absolutely loved my time with this car, but it's ready for its next adventure. Drop me a message if you want to come take it for a spin!

Used vehicle in good condition. Maintenance records available. Clean interior. Reliable performance.

This 2018 Executive Touring Sedan is a prime example of a well-maintained vehicle that balances luxury with daily practicality. The exterior features a deep metallic charcoal finish that retains a high-gloss luster, showing only minor, inevitable stone chips on the front fascia from highway travel. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of premium black leather and brushed aluminum accents; the upholstery is supple and free of tears, and the electronics—including the premium sound system and navigation—operate flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly, benefiting from a rigorous maintenance schedule with full service records included. Recent updates include a fresh set of high-performance all-season tires and a complete brake service. It offers a composed, quiet ride with responsive handling, making it an ideal choice for someone seeking a reliable, high-end driving experience without the new-car depreciation. This vehicle has been smoke-free and garage-kept, ensuring it remains in commendable shape for its next owner.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, offering a superior balance of refined performance and enduring reliability. This unit has undergone a comprehensive inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic preservation. Featuring a documented service history and a suite of premium amenities, this vehicle represents an exceptional investment for the discerning driver who demands both quality and value. It stands as a testament to conscientious ownership, ready for immediate delivery.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a sophisticated driving experience and exceptional value. Having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection, it presents in commendable condition, balancing refined aesthetics with proven mechanical reliability. A premier choice for the discerning driver seeking a dependable, high-quality pre-owned automobile.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that’s ready for its next adventure? This car has been well-loved and is in really solid shape, perfect for zipping around town or hitting the open road. It runs beautifully and has plenty of life left in it! I’m sad to see it go, but I know it’ll make its next owner very happy. Feel free to reach out if you want to come by and take it for a spin!
